hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '(runserver|npm (start|run dev)|yarn (start|dev)|uvicorn|gunicorn|manage\.py runserver|python -m|flask run|fastapi run|django.*run|celery worker|celery beat)' && echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Running or starting the application is not permitted in this environment. Implement and test logic without starting a server."}' || true
